from dataclasses import dataclass, asdict
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class UserResponse:
    id: int
    name: str
    email: str
    role: str
    created_at: datetime

    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        return {**asdict(self), "created_at": self.created_at.isoformat()}


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AdminUserResponse(UserResponse):
    last_login: Optional[datetime] = None

    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        base = super().to_dict()
        if self.last_login:
            base["last_login"] = self.last_login.isoformat()
        return base


def create_user_response(user) -> UserResponse:
    return UserResponse(
        id=user.id, name=user.name, email=user.email, role=user.role, created_at=user.created_at
    )


def create_admin_user_response(user) -> AdminUserResponse:
    return AdminUserResponse(
        id=user.id,
        name=user.name,
        email=user.email,
        role=user.role,
        created_at=user.created_at,
        last_login=user.last_login,
    )
